use_codes.desc: PROPHYLAXIS OF INVASIVE ASPERGILLUS AND CANDIDA INFECTIONS

indications.text:
1.1 Prophylaxis of Invasive Aspergillus and Candida Infections
Noxafil® injection, delayed-release tablets, and oral suspension are indicated for prophylaxis of
invasive Aspergillus and Candida infections in patients who are at high risk of developing these infections
due to being severely immunocom...

1.1 Treatment of Invasive Aspergillosis
Noxafil® injection and Noxafil delayed-release tablets are indicated for the treatment of invasive
aspergillosis in adults and pediatric patients 13 years of age and older.
